episodes.name: Without Fear or Favour
episodes.overview: A cough at the oath ceremony spells trouble for Tyagi’s judgeship. Ananya faces a rival in a toxic deodorant case. Sujata and Mintu spar as partners.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/hooh9xithy5z/maamla-legal-hai-s02e01-720p-web-dl-hindi-ddp5-1-x264-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Unbiased
episodes.overview: On his first day as judge, a harmless smile leads Tyagi down a controversial path. Ananya and Sujata fight for a colleague who was spanked by a woman.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/c45xtq0zb4un/maamla-legal-hai-s02e02-720p-web-dl-hindi-ddp5-1-x264-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Balanced
episodes.overview: Tyagi attempts to uphold a new and bold policy in the court. Sujata goes up against a man who claims a bottle of alcohol lacked a certain kick.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/i364m29ak5pn/maamla-legal-hai-s02e03-720p-web-dl-hindi-ddp5-1-x264-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Emotional Attachment
episodes.overview: Ananya struggles to put her skepticism aside in an organ donation case. A karaoke invite and a condolence order cause headaches for Tyagi.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/pejlu95m6cct/maamla-legal-hai-s02e04-720p-web-dl-hindi-ddp5-1-x264-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Juvenile
episodes.overview: Sujata finds a way to distract Mintu in court, while Ananya and Nayana clash over a young boy determined to lead a life of crime.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/rexvqd0jnr9t/maamla-legal-hai-s02e05-720p-web-dl-hindi-ddp5-1-x264-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Act of God
episodes.overview: Tyagi deals with electrocutions and faulty wires on the eve of his first official inspection. Sujata attempts to settle a tricky divorce mediation case.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/rjjbyx985k7g/maamla-legal-hai-s02e06-720p-web-dl-hindi-ddp5-1-x264-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Compromise
episodes.overview: On Lok Adalat Day, a conman seemingly hides in the crowd. Sujata and Mintu tackle opposing sides of a case involving a dead man's wife and his partner.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/tizcf51jvwpf/maamla-legal-hai-s02e07-720p-web-dl-hindi-ddp5-1-x264-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Beyond Reform
episodes.overview: Tyagi faces a case that could make or break his career. Ananya plans a sting operation to get to the bottom of Nayana's plan. Sujata is caught in a lie.
